title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs, discusses Fable and Mythos models that were pulled from the market by government order. He describes how AI agents like Fable change product development workflows and defends Anthropic's safety practices as material rather than marketing positioning. Krieger also discusses Anthropic's dual role as both platform and product competitor.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, joins Alex Kantrowitz's Big Technology Podcast to discuss Anthropic's Fable model and the broader shift toward AI-native product development. The conversation covers how AI changes engineering workflows, Anthropic's approach to safety, and the tension the company faces as both a platform that other developers build on and a product provider competing in the same market. The discussion touches on AI agents and test-time compute as part of Fable's capabilities.
